programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro entra en la habitación de Verónica y la reta: o lo manda a sacar con sus hombres o se queda para siempre en su vida. Ella distrae a la policía con las dos mujeres árabes y Lucho logra escapar, pero se queda en el pueblo. Irene no despierta.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El Lagarto finge entregarse a Rodrigo, pero le dispara; a su vez recibe un disparo mortal de Antonia. Alejandro y Gabriela viven una noche de amor intensa, mientras el celular de Alejandro recibe sucesivas llamadas por el intento de suicidio de Irene.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica está preocupada, pues sabe que Lucho no se fue de San Pedro. La señora Guerra lleva a Rodrigo al hospital y no deja de seducirlo. Lagarto sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no poder ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital. El comisionado besa a Antonia y Ricardo lo ve.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara y Norma se enfrentan a balazos con los pistoleros que acorralan a Juan, la policía encuentra algunas pistas. Fernando comienza a manipular en contra de sus hijas a una sumisa Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela y Fernando llegan de la luna de miel cuando Pepa le prepara una divertida bienvenida a Jimena, Fernando anuncia nuevas reglas. La policía captura a varios sospechosos de los atentados.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo les explican a los Reyes que se quedan en la hacienda ante el peligro que se cierne sobre Gabriela. Fernando contrata como mayordomos a dos antiguos enemigos de los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Leonidas vuelve a ofender a Ruth y Juan la defiende, pero Óscar impide que su hermano lo golpee porque es el médico que atendió a Jimena, Leonidas pide perdón, Eva encara a Raquel sobre Ruth.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Michelle decide irse de San Marino, se da cuenta que es un error hacerse ilusiones con Hugo. Alcides trata de encontrar en su hermano un aliado para apartar a Daniel de la vida de Soledad.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad y Michelle sostienen una intensa conversación. Eloísa y Alcides tienen una fuerte discusión porque ella no ha logrado cumplir sus planes, pero alguien descubre que son cómplices.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Michelle obliga a Eloísa a ir a la comisaría, tiene las cartas de Alcides como prueba de sus intenciones. Hugo reconoce ante Daniel sus sentimientos y le advierte que se cuide de su hermano.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides piensa que hacer con Michelle para que ella no arruine su estrategia con Soledad, después que Eloísa le dice todo lo que sucede. Daniel le avisa a Hugo que Michelle está desaparecida.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro entra en la habitación de Verónica y la reta: o lo manda a sacar con sus hombres o se queda para siempre en su vida. Ella distrae a la policía con las dos mujeres árabes y Lucho logra escapar, pero se queda en el pueblo. Irene no despierta.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El Lagarto finge entregarse a Rodrigo, pero le dispara; a su vez recibe un disparo mortal de Antonia. Alejandro y Gabriela viven una noche de amor intensa, mientras el celular de Alejandro recibe sucesivas llamadas por el intento de suicidio de Irene.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Host Phil Keoghan gathers the teams in Switzerland to restart the Race nearly 20 months after production was suspended for the.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Switzerland, where Racers bungee jump over 700 feet off the Verzasca Dam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel by private jet to Corsica, France, where they go canyoneering through the beautiful landscape of natural rockslides, waterfalls, and rivers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams continue racing through Corsica, France, where each team member must try a piece of casu martzu, also known as maggot.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy does some slick dealing to get rid of the town's worthless cannon, but when Opie mimics his father's shady deed, Andy has second thoughts.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, accused by Andy of being a gossip, sets out to prove that men are bigger gossips than women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, appointed judge of a beauty contest, shows the wisdom of Solomon by picking a popular winner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney finally solve the problem of moonshining in Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to counsel the constantly bickering couple, Fred and Jennie Boone, with mixed results.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy suspects that a traveling record promoter is a con artist and he fears for the townsfolk who invested in his record.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Barney's over-zealousness causes him to become a laughing stock, Andy tactfully arranges for Barney to regain his status.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A nationally known con man becomes a hero to Aunt Bee, Opie and Barney when he is held for two days in the Mayberry jail.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack trades his safari suit for a wet suit as he dives in with bottle-nosed dolphins! Jack and Sue, get more than they bargained for as they go along for the ride with dolphins on their daily outing into the open ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: See a pattern on this Wild Countdown? Whether it’s for camouflage or advertising deadly venom, every creature on today’s countdown is sporting stripes. Tigers, zebras, sea snakes, ring-tailed lemurs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: He explores Hawaii's tropical shorelines down to its deep coral reefs while feeding live coral, diving with stingrays, tracking sea turtles and even joining a tiger shark for its birthday.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack takes flight in Panama in search of Bats, Birds and other Jungle Creatures! Jack discovers how Bats are vital to Earth's pest control, and learns about one of the coolest adaptations in the animal world – echolocation!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Class
programme.desc: It's back to school for Jungle Jack as he continues his animal education in all sorts of interesting ways. From ranger school in Africa, to farrier school in Florida, and even zoo school. You never know what you'll learn on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Saving species on the brink of extinction takes a lot of work, but for the conservationists at White Oak in North Florida, it's their passion. This world-renowned breeding and research center conserves endangered species one animal at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: South Africa is the place for seeing the biggest and most recognizable animals in all of Africa. So today, Jack is heading straight to the famous Shamwari Game Reserve for up-close encounters with elephants, rhinos, lions, and the rest of the Big Five!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Ecuador's diverse landscapes are home to loads of unique creatures. Visit the Mashpi cloud forests, home to hummingbirds and bushmasters; witness birds of prey in flight near Otavalo's colorful markets; and the Quito Zoo welcomes a baby jaguar.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack joins in on a mission to save an Elephant caught in a deadly snare, before getting a glimpse of life on the savannah for Lions and Leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Ever wonder what Jack's favorite animal encounters have been? Get ready to dive with the great white and meet it face-to-face. It's all part of the fun when Jack chooses his favorites on the next Animal Adventures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack encounters reptiles including an Eye Lash Viper, a huge Python, and the deadly Bushmaster at the World of Snakes. On the Caribbean coast, Jack meets an American couple who has established the Sloth Rehabilitation Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Ever wonder how Jungle Jack manages to track down all of his animal stories? Today you'll see high-tech gear, and good ole-fashioned know-how in action, as he tracks down six surprising stories from the safari trail. Elephants, wild dogs and koalas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dangerously Cute
programme.desc: When it comes to wildlife, sometimes danger wears a disguise. Today, Jungle Jack is looking at the dark side of six deceptively darling animals, from the poison dart frog and duck-billed platypus to the hippopotamus. Find out which creature is number one.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathaleen travel to a remote island in the Canadian Province of British Columbia to catch sight of the rare “Spirit Bear,” an all-white Black Bear. Kathaleen also takes a behind the scenes tour of a floating lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Bear Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack as he counts down his coolest bear experiences… trekking the elusive spirit bear in Alaska, helping return a grizzly to his home in Montana, and meeting an adorable baby black bear in New Mexico. Plus 7 more amazing bear experiences.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue travel Down Under to visit one of the newest and greenest animal sanctuaries in Australia. They meet up with an inspiring young couple that is running a totally sustainable B&B while caring for orphaned and injured wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six species that turn heads, like moose, elk, Cape Buffalo, proboscis monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: It's a Colorful Life
programme.desc: Wild animals flaunt their colors for all sorts of reasons: to send a warning, to attract a mate and sometimes, it’s just something they ate! Today, Jack is counting down seven amazing animals that aren’t shy about showing their true colors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Join him as he visits some of his favorite aquariums and zoological parks, which are on a mission to help save wildlife. Meet sun bears, moose, sea lion pups, a baby rhino, and other wild animals that are all part of new zoo and aquarium programs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Canada's British Columbia, Jack flies by floatplane to Knight Inlet where he observes Grizzly Bears fattening up for hibernation on Pacific Salmon.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head into the state-of-the-art Animal Care Center at Busch Gardens Tampa Bay to assist veterinarians performing an exam on a lion!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he explores Chile from top to bottom! From the unique animals of the Atacama Desert to picturesque Patagonia, come along for a journey filled with South American wildlife like flamingoes, penguins, guanacos, and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets creatures armed with superb scales, like Nile Crocodiles, Galapagos Tortoises, Thorny Devils, an African Rock Python, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he journeys to Lake Nakuru National Park where wildlife is prospering in Central Kenya. The thriving ecosystem is home to more than a million flamingos, endangered white and black rhinos, and the rare Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along for an epic adventure to the tropical Caribbean Island of Curacao! Join Jungle Jack as he braves a deep diving Submarine, encounters Dolphins on the high seas, and rolls up his sleeves for Coral Reef Conservation.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Peru is brimming with unique wildlife, come along as Jungle Jack takes the adventure of a lifetime down the mighty Amazon! From Tapir and Sloth to Pink River Dolphins and Giant River Otters, this is a journey you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up a big, bold sausage casserole, packed full of flavor -it's a new family favorite in the Oliver house, then he shows us the most beautifully brilliant way to dress an aubergine salad, served with the quickest homemade flat breads.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a French twist; shows new ways to use up stale bread; and cooks up his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his friend and mentor Gennaro Contaldo.

programme.desc: Jamie travels to the Nicoyan Peninsula in Costa Rica and the island of Okinawa.

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food

programme.title: Jamie's Super Food
programme.desc: Jamie helps an 84-year-old work the land and enjoys a lunch overlooking the sea.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie shows how to make sweet pea fish pie and gives tips on basic bread and salad dressings.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie demonstrates his cheat's deep-pan pizza with lots of topping ideas, and a flexible slow-cooked beef and ale stew that's easy to adapt.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: A flexible corner-shop curry perfect for a Friday night and a hearty, nutritious minestrone that embraces all sorts of vegetables.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.desc: When his daughter tells him his new beats are old news, Stevie decides to takes his music in a surprising direction. Stevie's old flame Mimi Faust needs a favor for their daughter Eva, but Stevie isn't sure he's up to the task. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: In the Basketball Wives LA Season 4 Reunion Special, Mehgan shocks the ladies with something she found online and tensions between Tami and Brandi explode over talk of Draya. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: It's an all new season of "Bridezillas" and these brides are crazier than ever! One of these brides hates to be touched. The other hates her soon-to-be mother-in-law and bans her from their wedding ceremony!

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: It's the jaw dropping conclusion to Jennifer's in-law showdown. Kenya, another bride we meet, has 23 members in her wedding party! And they have the planner running in circles! Oh, and the planner is Kenya's best friend!

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Kenya meets karma on her wedding day! Katrina's wedding dress is too tight! Katrina, a New York bride, binged her way out of one wedding dress and wants her parents to buy her a new one, since she refuses to go on a diet.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Katrina continues to binge in hopes she'll get a new wedding dress. This wedding might be doomed because she's not the only one with a wardrobe malfunction. Janelle is handling being a bride by being mad at everyone and everything!

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Katrina takes her sister down WWF style. Lisa is getting re-married to her ex! Lisa is a loud-mouthed, over the top, insane Jersey bride.

programme.title: Bridezillas
programme.desc: Youmika doesn't pull punches and Lisa astounds with jaw-dropping antics leading one to wonder why her ex-husband would ever agree to marry her again!

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Karen and Drita prepare to meet, Renee calls in the help of a shaman, and Big Ang throws a dinner party in hopes of bringing all the women together.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Joy Behar hosts as the Mob Wives sit down for an intense and explosive reunion. Renee and her sister, Jenn, address Junior becoming an informant for the FBI. Ramona and Drita's simmering animosity boils over into complete chaos.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Carla's husband, Joe, and Karen's baby daddy, Dave, sit down to explain their chaotic love lives. Big Ang explains the truth behind her arrest and her issues with her husband, Neal.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: After a break in at her home, Renee fears that she and her son AJ are being targeted. Drita and Big Ang try to help settle the feud between Carla and Renee.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: After a call from Lee, Drita contemplates taking her kids to visit him in jail for the first time in years. Joe's young girlfriend is revealed and Carla learns that they are much more serious than she thought.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: After receiving a threatening letter from Junior, Renee fears for her life and makes it her number one priority to move. Ramona struggles with the uncertainty over her boyfriend's sentence.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns for a historic 20th season. This season kicks off with the Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown where six players remain in the battle for the top prize of $1 million dollars.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: The WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown resumes as five players remain from the massive starting field of 2010 entrants. Darren Elias and Mark Davis lead the final five in this heated battle for $1 million dollars.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for $1 million dollars continues as three players remain at the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown Final Table. Each player is now guaranteed a minimum third place prize of $490,000.

programme.title: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown 2023 - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: From HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada it's the WPT Choctaw Final Table where the final six players are competing for the top prize of $486,600 and the title of WPT Champion.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 2
programme.desc: Four players remain in the battle for WPT Choctaw Champion. Steve "Cuz" Buckner is fired up and determined to find a way to win his first WPT Title. He is breaking out big bluffs backed by some big talk in hopes of outwitting his final three opponents.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 3
programme.desc: The fight for first continues at HyperX Arena in Las Vegas, Nevada as our four remaining players hope to become a WPT Champion and leave with the first place prize of $486,600.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw 2023 - Part 4
programme.desc: Two players remain, but only one can claim the title of WPT Choctaw Champion. Both Chance Kornuth and Steve "Cuz" Buckner begin this heads up match with nearly even stacks in what promises to be an epic battle.

programme.title: WPT Ladies Championship 2023 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Final Table of the first ever WPT Ladies Championship at Wynn Las Vegas is set. Kathy Liebert, Jamie Kerstetter, Olga Iermolcheva, Lina Niu, Cindy Spier, and Dusti Smith round out our final six.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!
